channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. WATCH: IDF destroys Hezbollah rocket launcher inside civilian building in southern Lebanon  The Jerusalem Post
  3. IDF Carries Out Massive Strikes on Hezbollah Tunnels in Southern Lebanon  Haaretz
  4. Video: Netanyahu says Israel destroyed ‘massive’ tunnel in Lebanon  Middle East Eye
  5. Large explosion in southern Lebanon causes earthquake in northern Israel  Anadolu Ajansı

item.title: China pushes EU capitals to scrap 'Made in Europe' law or face retaliation - Euronews.com
item.description:
1. China pushes EU capitals to scrap 'Made in Europe' law or face retaliation  Euronews.com
  2. China threatens action if EU does not revise new industry and tech rules  Reuters
  3. China Threatens EU With Retaliation if It Bans Huawei Gear  Bloomberg
  4. China warns EU over ‘Made in Europe’ plan, vows countermeasures  France 24
  5. China threatens to retaliate over EU self-reliance push  politico.eu

item.title: China is America’s Military Equal Now And In Any Future Fight, Marine General Warns - The War Zone
item.description:
1. China is America’s Military Equal Now And In Any Future Fight, Marine General Warns  The War Zone
  2. The Marine Corps Must Plan Now for a Long War with China | USNI Proceedings  Small Wars Journal

item.title: In France, American Universities Lose Their Allure in the Trump Era - The New York Times
item.description: In France, American Universities Lose Their Allure in the Trump Era  The New York Times
